CloudTrailLogsBucketName.Description: S3 bucket storing the CloudTrail object-level data-event logs

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Properties.Description: KMS key for ServerlessAppAudit-us-east-1 CloudTrail audit logs

rules_to_suppress.reason: CloudTrail log bucket — SSE-S3 (CloudTrail delivery doesn't support KMS-CMK destination buckets; trail log files are per-object SSE-KMS), self-logging would create circular audit trails, no versioning/replication for an append-only, integrity-validated log sink
